name: Dunelm Group PLC
description: The UK's leading homewares retailer with 180+ stores plus a growing digital platform, offering affordable and high-quality home essentials.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Market share gains in UK homewares (currently ~10% share). Digital channel growth, new store openings (target 200 stores), and average basket growth.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Operational efficiency, direct sourcing benefits, and digital mix shift. Gross margin expected to remain in 50-52% range.
assumptions.risks: Consumer confidence sensitivity, housing market dependency, competitive pressure from online retailers, cost inflation in shipping and raw materials.
assumptions.catalyst: Continued market share gains, store rollout to 200+, digital penetration beyond 35%, and international expansion potential.
